data.en: Tom has lost his key.
data.cn: 汤姆弄丢了他的钥匙。
accept: Tom has lost his key.

data.en: He told me his name, but I've forgotten it.
data.cn: 他告诉了我他的名字，但我已经忘了。
accept: He told me his name, but I've forgotten it.

data.en: Sally is still here. She hasn't gone out.
data.cn: 莎莉还在这里。她还没出去。
accept: Sally is still here. She hasn't gone out.

data.en: I can't find my bag. Have you seen it?
data.cn: 我找不到我的包了。你看到它了吗？
accept: I can't find my bag. Have you seen it?

data.en: Ow! I've cut my finger.
data.cn: 嗷！我割伤了手指。
accept: Ow! I've cut my finger.

data.en: The road is closed. There's been an accident.
data.cn: 路封了。发生了一起事故。
data.hint: Contraction: There's been = There has been
accept: The road is closed. There's been an accident.

data.en: Police have arrested two men in connection with the robbery.
data.cn: 警察逮捕了两名与抢劫案有关的男子。
accept: Police have arrested two men in connection with the robbery.

data.en: James is on holiday. He has gone to Italy.
data.cn: 詹姆斯在度假。他去意大利了。
data.hint: gone to: 去了还没回来
accept: James is on holiday. He has gone to Italy.

data.en: Amy is back home now. She has been to Italy.
data.cn: 艾米现在回到了家。她去过意大利。
accept: Amy is back home now. She has been to Italy.

data.en: Are you hungry? No, I've just had lunch.
data.cn: 你饿吗？不，我刚吃过午饭。
accept: Are you hungry? No, I've just had lunch.

data.en: Hello. Have you just arrived?
data.cn: 你好。你刚到吗？
accept: Hello. Have you just arrived?

data.en: Don't forget to pay the bill. I've already paid it.
data.cn: 别忘了付账。我已经付过了。
accept: Don't forget to pay the bill. I've already paid it.

data.en: What time is Mark leaving? He's already left.
data.cn: 马克什么时候走？他已经走了。
accept: What time is Mark leaving? He's already left.

data.en: Has it stopped raining yet?
data.cn: 雨停了吗？
data.hint: yet: 用于疑问句，意为“已经”
accept: Has it stopped raining yet?

data.en: I've written the email, but I haven't sent it yet.
data.cn: 我已经写好了邮件，但还没发。
data.hint: yet: 用于否定句，意为“还”
accept: I've written the email, but I haven't sent it yet.

data.en: Ben isn't here. He's gone out.
data.cn: 本不在这里。他出去了。
accept: Ben isn't here. He's gone out.

data.en: Tom is looking for his key. He can't find it.
data.cn: 汤姆正在找他的钥匙。他找不到。
accept: Tom is looking for his key. He can't find it.

data.en: Maria's English wasn't very good. Now it is better.
data.cn: 玛丽亚以前英语不太好。现在好多了。
accept: Maria's English wasn't very good. Now it is better.

data.en: Her English has improved.
data.cn: 她的英语提高了。
accept: Her English has improved.

data.en: My bag was here, but it isn't here any more.
data.cn: 我的包刚才还在，但现在不见了。
accept: My bag was here, but it isn't here any more.

data.en: My bag has disappeared.
data.cn: 我的包消失了。
accept: My bag has disappeared.

data.en: Lisa can't walk and her leg is in plaster.
data.cn: 丽莎不能走路，她的腿打着石膏。
accept: Lisa can't walk and her leg is in plaster.

data.en: Lisa has broken her leg.
data.cn: 丽莎摔断了腿。
accept: Lisa has broken her leg.

data.en: Last week the bus fare was £1.80. Now it is £2.
data.cn: 上周公交费是1.8英镑。现在是2英镑。
accept: Last week the bus fare was £1.80. Now it is £2.

data.en: The bus fare has gone up.
data.cn: 公交费涨了。
accept: The bus fare has gone up.

data.en: Dan didn't have a beard before. Now he has a beard.
data.cn: 丹以前没胡子。现在有胡子了。
accept: Dan didn't have a beard before. Now he has a beard.

data.en: Dan has grown a beard.
data.cn: 丹留了胡子。
accept: Dan has grown a beard.

data.en: It was raining ten minutes ago. It isn't raining now.
data.cn: 十分钟前在下雨。现在没下了。
accept: It was raining ten minutes ago. It isn't raining now.

data.en: It has stopped raining.
data.cn: 雨停了。
accept: It has stopped raining.

data.en: I washed my sweater, and now it's too small for me.
data.cn: 我洗了毛衣，现在对我来说太小了。
accept: I washed my sweater, and now it's too small for me.

data.en: My sweater has shrunk.
data.cn: 我的毛衣缩水了。
accept: My sweater has shrunk.

data.en: My parents are on holiday. They've gone to Italy.
data.cn: 我父母在度假。他们去意大利了。
accept: My parents are on holiday. They've gone to Italy.

data.en: Hello! I've just been to the shops.
data.cn: 你好！我刚去过商店。
accept: Hello! I've just been to the shops.

data.en: I've bought lots of things.
data.cn: 我买了很多东西。
accept: I've bought lots of things.

data.en: Tom has just gone out. He'll be back in about an hour.
data.cn: 汤姆刚出去。他大约一小时后回来。
accept: Tom has just gone out. He'll be back in about an hour.

data.en: Alice isn't here at the moment. I don't know where she's gone.
data.cn: 艾丽丝现在不在这儿。我不知道她去哪儿了。
accept: Alice isn't here at the moment. I don't know where she's gone.

data.en: You're very late. Where have you been?
data.cn: 你迟到了很久。你刚才去哪儿了？
accept: You're very late. Where have you been?

data.en: I can't find my bag. Have you seen it anywhere?
data.cn: 我找不到我的包。你在哪儿见过它吗？
accept: I can't find my bag. Have you seen it anywhere?

data.en: I can't log on to the website. I've forgotten my password.
data.cn: 我登录不上网站。我忘了密码。
accept: I can't log on to the website. I've forgotten my password.

data.en: I sent Joe an email this morning, but he hasn't replied.
data.cn: 我今天早上给乔发了邮件，但他还没回。
accept: I sent Joe an email this morning, but he hasn't replied.

data.en: Is the meeting still going on, or has it finished?
data.cn: 会议还在进行，还是已经结束了？
accept: Is the meeting still going on, or has it finished?

data.en: The weather has changed. It's colder now.
data.cn: 天气变了。现在更冷了。
accept: The weather has changed. It's colder now.

data.en: You haven't signed the form. Could you sign it now, please?
data.cn: 你还没在表格上签名。请现在签一下好吗？
accept: You haven't signed the form. Could you sign it now, please?

data.en: Are your friends still here, or have they gone home?
data.cn: 你的朋友们还在吗，还是已经回家了？
accept: Are your friends still here, or have they gone home?

data.en: Paul doesn't know what he's going to do. He hasn't decided yet.
data.cn: 保罗不知道他要做什么。他还没决定。
accept: Paul doesn't know what he's going to do. He hasn't decided yet.

data.en: Do you know where Julia is? Yes, I've just seen her.
data.cn: 你知道朱莉娅在哪儿吗？知道，我刚看到她。
accept: Do you know where Julia is? Yes, I've just seen her.

data.en: When is David going away? He's already gone.
data.cn: 大卫什么时候走？他已经走了。
accept: When is David going away? He's already gone.

data.en: Has your course started yet? Not yet.
data.cn: 你的课程开始了吗？还没。
accept: Has your course started yet? Not yet.

data.en: I'm afraid he's just gone out.
data.cn: 恐怕他刚出去。
accept: I'm afraid he's just gone out.

data.en: Wait a minute! I haven't finished yet.
data.cn: 等一下！我还没完成。
accept: Wait a minute! I haven't finished yet.
